---
title: "Lillian Whiting" 
about:
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/profile2.png
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://instagram.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: https://GITHUB_USERNAME.github.io/resume-example.pdf
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:lrw8@geneseo.edu

---


Lillian Whiting majors in Sustainable Studies and minors in Data Analytics at SUNY Geneseo. When not working on data analytics, Finley enjoys spending time crafting gifts for Friend and family.

## Education

State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY <br>
B.S. in Sustainable Studies | Aug 2021 - May 2025 <br>
Minor in Data Analytics 

## Experience

Starbucks Analytics | Data Analyst Intern | May 2024 - Aug 2024


Ticketing Officer | Work Study, Parking Enforcement | Geneseo, NY | SEPT 2021 – MAY 2022, SEPT 2022 – MAY 2023, SEPT 2023 - MAY 2024 


Office Intern | Genesee County Job Center | Batavia, NY  |JULY 2022 – AUG 2022


Intern | Go Art | Batavia, NY | MAY 2021 – AUG 2021,
MAY 2019 – AUG 2019

Office Intern | Coastal Staffing | Batavia, NY | JULY 2020 – AUG 2020
